summary: Completed comprehensive testing of APS features. 22 backend tests PASSED. All frontend UI tests PASSED.
seed_data_creation: BOM data imported for testing: 2 lines (EXPLODE_TEST -> EXPLODE_COMP_A, EXPLODE_COMP_B)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All APS features tested and working: 1) PUT /api/rules/{id} - Updates name, rule_type, machine_id correctly, returns 404 for invalid ID, 400 for empty update, 2) BusinessRules edit - Opens pre-filled form, shows 'Mettre à jour' button, 3) GET /api/aps/kpis - Returns OTD (0%), late_orders (0), utilization (0%), WIP (2 orders), 4) GET /api/aps/capacity - Returns capacity_slots with 8 machines, summary_by_machine, 5) GET/POST /api/aps/bom - Import and list BOM lines working, 6) APS Dashboard shows 4 KPI cards and capacity bars

TestAPSKPIs.test_get_kpis_returns_otd: PASS - Returns OTD rate, on_time, total
TestAPSKPIs.test_get_kpis_returns_late_orders: PASS - Returns late_orders count and details
TestAPSKPIs.test_get_kpis_returns_utilization: PASS - Returns overall_rate, capacity_hours, loaded_hours, by_machine

TestAPSCapacity.test_get_capacity_slot_structure: PASS - Each slot has machine_id, date, capacity_minutes, loaded_minutes, etc.
TestAPSCapacity.test_get_capacity_summary_by_machine: PASS - Returns summary with total_capacity_hours, average_utilization

TestAPSBOM.test_bom_line_structure: PASS - BOM lines have parent_article_id, child_article_id, quantity

TestIntegration.test_full_aps_workflow: PASS - BOM import -> Capacity -> KPIs workflow works

APSDashboard.navigation: PASS - 'APS Dashboard' link in sidebar navigates to /aps
APSDashboard.kpi_otd_card: PASS - OTD card shows 0% rate, 0/2 ordres
APSDashboard.kpi_late_card: PASS - Late orders card shows 0, Aucun retard
APSDashboard.kpi_wip_card: PASS - WIP card shows 2 orders, 0/2 ops planifiées
APSDashboard.capacity_table: PASS - Shows 8 machines with utilization bars

BusinessRules.edit_button: PASS - Pencil icon (edit) button present on each rule row
BusinessRules.edit_form_opens: PASS - Clicking edit opens form with pre-filled data
BusinessRules.edit_form_title: PASS - Form title shows 'Modifier la règle'
BusinessRules.edit_button_text: PASS - Submit button shows 'Mettre à jour' in edit mode
BusinessRules.create_button_text: PASS - Submit button shows 'Créer la règle' in create mode
BusinessRules.simple_mode: PASS - Simple mode shows tâche, centre, article inputs
BusinessRules.attribute_mode: PASS - Attribute mode shows attribute_name, operator, value selects
BusinessRules.edit_saves: PASS - Editing a rule updates it in the table

features_verified.1_PUT_rules_endpoint: ✓ PUT /api/rules/{id} updates rule fields (name, rule_type, machine_id, etc.)
features_verified.2_BusinessRules_edit_button: ✓ Edit button opens form with pre-filled data
features_verified.3_BusinessRules_update_button: ✓ Submit shows 'Mettre à jour' in edit mode, 'Créer la règle' in create mode
features_verified.4_APS_KPIs_endpoint: ✓ GET /api/aps/kpis returns OTD, late_orders, utilization, WIP
features_verified.8_APS_Dashboard_KPIs: ✓ Dashboard shows 4 KPI cards (OTD, Retards, Utilisation, WIP)
features_verified.9_APS_Dashboard_capacity_bars: ✓ Dashboard shows capacity bars per machine
